mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tree(covert_images, tree_code, price, variety, description, saleStatus, address, location_point, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{covertImages}, #{treeCode}, #{price}, #{variety}, #{description}, #{saleStatus}, #{address}, #{locationPoint}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{isDeleted});
mapper.update: UPDATE tree SET covert_images = #{covertImages}, tree_code = #{treeCode}, price = #{price}, variety = #{variety}, description = #{description}, saleStatus = #{saleStatus}, address = #{address}, covert_images = #{covertImages}, location_point = #{locationPoint}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
